author: Muhammad Rifqi Haikal
name: 11L XSA6 + Warmdown3000 + QAT@0.30
blurb: Extended XSA to 6 layers, shortened warmdown to 3000 iters, raised late QAT threshold to 0.30. Built on SOTA stack (11L, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, EMA 0.997, GPTQ-lite, int6+zstd-22). Hyperparameters selected via 37 ablation experiments on RTX 4060 Ti.
